description: Karaite betrothal deed. Dated 28 Elul 5511 AM (1751 CE). Location: Cairo. Bride: Neḥama bt. Yahuda b. Aharon. Groom: Menashe b. Shlomo (deceased) b. Yeshūʿa Rofe. The marital payments are listed as: 50 kesif + 670 medin + 200 medin + 800 medin. The groom commits not to marry another wife for 20 years, but if his wife will become childless he can take another wife after 10 years. He also can not travel to Damascus or Constantinople for 20 years but permitted to go to Jerusalem. AA/MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
